owner_gated_tests.owner_login: BLOCKED — owner email/password not available in sandbox; chat page is owner-gated

blockers: Owner credentials (iperez4242@gmail.com password) are not available in the Rork sandbox — owner-gated chat/members/admin screens cannot be automated.
The QA endpoints are owner-only (assertIVXOwnerOnly). A real Supabase owner JWT or the IVX_AI_SYSTEM_SECRET value is required to exercise them.

Chromium installation on the Render Alpine container is non-fatal in the Dockerfile (build succeeds either way), but screenshots via the production QA endpoints require the browser binary to be present at runtime. The current deploy may or may not have Chromium installed depending on whether the Alpine package resolution succeeded.

credentials_used.render_api_key: NOT_DIRECTLY_AVAILABLE — exists in live backend process.env, not in sandbox

final_status_detail: The IVX Browser Automation QA service is deployed to production (f1eb2fb live on Render). Public pages (landing + chat login screen) are verified with real headless-Chromium screenshots. Owner-gated flows (chat send, AI reply, persistence, members, admin) cannot be verified without owner credentials or the IVX_AI_SYSTEM_SECRET.
